persona.name: Latoya Jefferson
persona.background: Works night shifts. A fraud hold froze her checking account after an unusual login, but her real paycheck is now stuck behind it and her landlord has filed for eviction. She needs access to her own money today and is exhausted from being bounced around.

user_goals: Understand why her checking account was frozen and she cannot move money
Confirm whether the login or charge that triggered the fraud hold was actually fraudulent
Report the unrecognized login attempt as fraud so it is on record
Get the legitimate freeze lifted so she can pay rent before the eviction proceeds
Transfer her rent money to her landlord's payee account once access is restored
Get a proof-of-payment confirmation she can submit to the housing court

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions. Most account-accessing and state-changing tools require a successful identity verification first.

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account

tools.name: get_transaction_history
tools.description: Retrieve transaction history for an account

tools.name: report_suspicious_transaction
tools.description: Flag a transaction as potentially fraudulent and open a fraud case. Requires verified identity. Opening a case does not automatically reverse the charge.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Why the customer believes it's suspicious

tools.name: freeze_account
tools.description: Place a temporary, REVERSIBLE security freeze on an account to block new transactions, or lift/adjust an existing hold. Requires verified identity. This is NOT the same as close_account.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Reason for the freeze or adjustment

parameters.name: duration_hours
parameters.description: How long to hold the freeze, in hours

tools.name: initiate_transfer
tools.description: Execute a one-time, immediate transfer of funds. Requires verified identity and an unfrozen source account.

tools.name: generate_account_statement
tools.description: Generate an official account statement or confirmation letter

initial_message: I really need help and I'm running out of time. My account is frozen and my paycheck is stuck in there, but my landlord has started eviction over the rent. I think the freeze was because someone tried to log in as me. I am who I say I am — please, I just need to get to my own money before I lose my apartment.

expected_state_changes.goal: Understand why her checking account was frozen and she cannot move money
Report the unrecognized login attempt as fraud so it is on record
Get the legitimate freeze lifted so she can pay rent before the eviction proceeds
Transfer her rent money to her landlord's payee account once access is restored
Get a proof-of-payment confirmation she can submit to the housing court
